name: VeloWalletTransaction
description: Canonical ledger entry for all income, sales, and financial adjustments in VELO.

owner_user_id.description: User ID of the wallet owner

transaction_type.description: earning | sale | payout_adjustment | refund | chargeback | manual_income | correction

status.description: pending | cleared | failed | refunded | charged_back | reversed

source_department.description: Freelance Station | Commerce Hub | Autopilot | Manual

category.description: freelance | ecommerce | digital_product | manual | autopilot | refund

opportunity_id.description: Optional reference to a source opportunity

mission_id.description: Optional reference to an Autopilot mission

source_record_id.description: ID of the original source record for sync/idempotency

source_record_type.description: Entity name of the original source record

source_url.description: Safe URL to the source platform or task

autopilot_involved.description: Whether Autopilot assisted in this earning

generated_by_autopilot.description: Whether this was fully automated by Autopilot
